subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from the presence of One All-Knowing, All-Wise. Verily, it hath been separated from the Most Great Book which speaketh among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن علیم حکیم انه قد فصل من الکتاب الاعظم الذی ینطق بین
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
